code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut best = 0
mut found = false
for tok in tokens
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    if n > 0
      if not found
        best = n
        found = true
      else if n > best
        best = n
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

if found
  print("max=#{best}")
else
  print("none")
end
